L1_headline: + ESPR – Benjamin Looker files to sell 6,517 shares. | 12/17/25
L2_brief: Benjamin Looker, an officer at Esperion Therapeutics, filed to sell 6,517 shares of common stock valued at approximately $23,897. The sale is to cover tax obligations from recently vested restricted stock, representing a routine compensation-related transaction rather than discretionary selling.

L3_detailed.broker_info: Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC, 900 Salem Street, Smithfield, RI 02917
L3_detailed.deal_signal: N/A - This appears to be a routine tax-related sale following restricted stock vesting, not indicative of any deal-related concerns. The seller has conducted similar small sales in prior months (6,267 shares in Sept, 1,248 shares in Oct) following the same pattern.
risks_flagged: None significant - sale is explicitly for tax obligation coverage on vested equity
Small dollar value (~$24K) suggests routine compensation-related transaction
Pattern consistent with prior months' sales for same purpose
